ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY THE DEFENDANT WILLIE L. BROWN IS "DENIED". THE CASE REMAINS SET ON THE ORIGINAL HEARING DATE ON MAR-05-2010 AT 8:30 AM DEPT #506. THE REQUEST WAS NOT FILED AT LEAST 10 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING AND GOOD CAUSE WAS NOT SHOWN FOR THE LATE REQUEST. CLERK SHOULD ADVISE DEFENDANT OF HIS RIGHTS TO REQUEST TELEPHONIC APPEARANCES. IF REQUESTED, COURT WILL GRANT. PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.
